title: Displaying Pairs of i and j using Nested Loops

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate the use of a nested `for` loop where the outer loop runs from 0 to 2, and the inner loop runs from 0 to 1. For every combination of `i` and `j`, the program prints their values in the format `i: , j: `.


**When executed, the code will show:**

```default
i: 0, j: 0
i: 0, j: 1
i: 1, j: 0
i: 1, j: 1
i: 2, j: 0
i: 2, j: 1
```
